title: ArtifactsAndSouls
description:
Mobs drop souls that can later be turned into gold iron and diamond and subsequently awaken them on a special table.
after that, you can use all the souls for a variety of crafts, from an amulet giving strength to a staff of seas shooting compacted water
body:
Mobs drop souls that can later be turned into gold iron and diamond and subsequently awaken them on a special table.
after that, you can use all the souls for a variety of crafts, from an amulet giving strength to a staff of seas shooting compacted water
